节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: The context of an ability or an application.  It allows access to application-specific resources, request and verification permissions. Can only be obtained through the ability.

Get the local root dir of an app. If it is the first call, the dir will be created. If in the context of the ability, return the root dir of the ability; if in the context of the application, return the root dir of the application.
节点.return_description: the root dir

节点.功能描述: Get the local root dir of an app. If it is the first call, the dir will be created. If in the context of the ability, return the root dir of the ability; if in the context of the application, return the root dir of the application.
注释信息: @param { AsyncCallback<string> } callback - Returns the local root directory of the application.

parameters.说明: Returns the local root directory of the application.

节点.功能描述: Verify whether the specified permission is allowed for a particular pid and uid running in the system. Pid and uid are optional. If you do not pass in pid and uid, it will check your own permission. and UID have the permission; callback with {@code -1} otherwise.
注释信息: @param { string } permission - The name of the specified permission.
@returns { Promise<number> } asynchronous callback with {@code 0} if the PID

parameters.说明: The name of the specified permission.
PermissionOptions } [options] - Permission Options.

节点.return_description: asynchronous callback with {@code 0} if the PID

@param { AsyncCallback<number> } callback - Return permission verification result, 0 has permission,

节点.功能描述: Requests certain permissions from the system.
注释信息: @param { Array<string> } permissions - Indicates the list of permissions to be requested.parameter cannot be null.
@param { number } requestCode - Indicates the request code to be passed to the PermissionRequestResult
@param { AsyncCallback<PermissionRequestResult> } resultCallback - Return authorization result information.

parameters.说明: Indicates the list of permissions to be requested.parameter cannot be null.
Indicates the request code to be passed to the PermissionRequestResult
Return authorization result information.
